mapper.select: select face_id, user_id, provider_code, face_token, status, liveness_mode, last_liveness_time, last_liveness_biz_id, last_liveness_status, last_enroll_time, last_login_time, create_time, update_time, remark from sys_user_face where user_id = #{userId} and status = '0' limit 1
mapper.update: update sys_user_face set provider_code = #{providerCode}, face_token = #{faceToken}, status = #{status}, liveness_mode = #{livenessMode}, last_liveness_time = #{lastLivenessTime}, last_liveness_biz_id = #{lastLivenessBizId}, last_liveness_status = #{lastLivenessStatus}, last_enroll_time = #{lastEnrollTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where face_id = #{faceId}
update sys_user_face set last_login_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId} and status = '0'
